site.name: GFork Proxy
site.tagline: Greasy Fork script access acceleration service
home.intro: Welcome to the world of 'browser user scripts'. GFork is dedicated to providing reliable mirror acceleration for Greasy Fork users, speeding up access through Asia-Pacific servers and solving loading errors for a smoother script installation experience. GFork only provides web pages and accelerated downloads — it does not create or store any scripts or data content. All content is synchronized with the official site in real time. GFork is not directly affiliated with Greasy Fork, and users bear their own responsibility for the legality and risks of script content. All content displayed on this site has undergone automatic compliance review through a filtering system, ensuring data consistency with the official site except for update links. GFork is not responsible for any copyright issues or disputes arising from third-party scripts.
home.recommend: If you are a user in mainland China with automation needs for educational platforms or video platforms, we strongly recommend using the user script store ScriptCat, operated by 油猴中文网 (bbs.tampermonkey.net.cn), to download user scripts (Note: 油猴中文网 and ScriptCat servers are located in Japan) for better community support.

tos.title: GFork Proxy Terms of Service
tos.preamble: Before using the GFork Proxy user script acceleration platform (the 'Platform'), please read and understand this Terms of Service ('Agreement'). Any use of the Platform constitutes your acceptance of this Agreement.
tos.section1_1: The Platform is operated by the GFork team, providing technical services for user script download acceleration and access.
tos.section1_2: Script data on the Platform is mirrored from Greasyfork. We do not store any user script content or user privacy data. The Platform only provides technical platform services and is not affiliated with any third-party websites, services, or content.
tos.section2_1: You commit to complying with the laws and regulations of your country or region and strictly adhere to this Agreement and relevant management rules.
tos.section2_2: You must not use the Platform for: spreading malware, viruses, or harmful code; infringing on intellectual property or other legal rights; network attacks or other destructive behavior; posting false, misleading, or fraudulent information; harassing, intimidating, or threatening others; other actions violating laws, regulations, or public order.
tos.section2_3: You must not interfere with, disrupt, or affect the normal operation of the Platform through: obtaining source server IPs, brute-force scanning, DDoS, CC attacks, XSS, etc.
tos.section2_4: You are responsible for all activities under your access.
tos.section3_1: Use the Platform in accordance with this Agreement and receive technical support.
tos.section3_2: Comply with this Agreement and related rules, maintain internet order and security; independently evaluate the safety and legality of user scripts and bear all associated risks; protect personal information and privacy, do not disclose or misuse others' personal information.
tos.section3_3_content: Content Responsibility: Any content downloaded from this Platform should be deleted within 24 hours. We are not responsible for the legality, safety, or suitability of user scripts downloaded through this Platform. You bear all risks. Data Source: Script data is mirrored from Greasyfork; we do not store any user script content. System Limitations: The login system comes from Greasyfork and may be unstable. It will not work properly on systems requiring CAPTCHA verification such as script publishing. Login works on comment, user, and report features but cookies are not transmitted on other pages. Please avoid using the login system on all mirror sites.
tos.section4_1: This platform does not accept any donations.
tos.section4_2: You understand and agree that we may adjust the display and content of advertisements based on circumstances.
tos.section5_1: You understand and agree that force majeure and other risk factors may affect the service. We will endeavor to address such situations but are exempt from liability for resulting losses.
tos.section5_2: We are not liable for service interruptions or disruptions caused by: malware, viruses, Trojans, etc.; hardware, software, or communication line failures; improper user operation or unauthorized use; outdated software versions, device aging, or compatibility issues; circumstances beyond our control or reasonable foresight; third-party service provider outages; CDN debt from traffic spikes; other force majeure events.
tos.section5_3: We are not responsible for the legality, safety, or suitability of user scripts downloaded through this Platform. You bear all risks.
tos.section6_1: The final interpretation of this Agreement rests with the GFork Proxy operator.
tos.section6_2: If any provision of this Agreement is invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain in effect.
tos.section6_3: We may modify or update this Agreement due to legal changes or webpage functionality changes, and publish it on this page without further notice. Your continued use of the Platform constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
tos.section6_4: Any disputes arising from this Agreement shall be resolved through friendly negotiation.

applist.title_page: Available User Script Managers by Platform
installing.what_is: What are user scripts (Tampermonkey/JS scripts) and what do they do?
installing.intro: User scripts are not ordinary tools — they rewrite web pages, remove annoying elements, as freely as improvisation, yet as precise as destiny's script. Install these free scripts written by users worldwide on Greasy Fork, and in the moment you click confirm, your browsing experience is effortlessly and thoroughly reconstructed.
installing.desc: Simply put, injecting user scripts into browser pages is one way to introduce third-party optimizations and enhancements for specific websites. Obviously, this may bring risks such as personal account theft or website feature disabling. This acceleration tool site is committed to only modifying the script's source update API address in the script code. Please choose scripts carefully for installation — some malicious scripts may operate illegally on your data. This site cannot be responsible for script security reliability.
installing.step1_title: Step 1: Install a user script manager
installing.step1_link: Available user script managers by platform
installing.step2_text:
1. Open the homepage (GFork Proxy provides Greasy Fork acceleration service — using this site implies you have read and agreed to the Terms of Service)
2. Enter the script name or feature keywords in the search box
3. Select a suitable script from search results (you can click 'Install' directly, but it's better to check the reviews first)
4. After entering the script details page, review carefully, then click the green 'Install this script' button
5. Your installed user script manager will pop up an installation confirmation window — click 'Install'
installing.step3_text:
1. After installation, visit the website the script applies to
2. The script will run automatically (some scripts may need a page refresh)
3. Some scripts add control buttons or menus on the page — you can adjust script functions through these interfaces
installing.notes:
1. Install scripts from trusted sources whenever possible
2. Always read the script description and reviews before installation to understand functionality and security status
3. Regularly update scripts to get the latest features and bug fixes
4. If a script causes page issues, temporarily disable or delete it through your browser's script management interface
installing.qa_manage_text:
1. Click the user script manager (Tampermonkey) icon in the browser toolbar
2. Select 'Dashboard'
3. In the 'Installed scripts' tab, you can: enable/disable scripts, edit script code, check for updates, delete scripts
installing.qa_download: Why does it show a download file/code instead of an install button?
installing.qa_download_text:
1. If using a mobile browser, ensure the browser supports Tampermonkey scripts. For Via Browser, there may be a delay — wait 30 seconds
2. For desktop browsers, ensure your user script manager is working properly. If Tampermonkey is not working, try switching to ScriptCat
installing.qa_baidu: Why does a Baidu search page appear?
installing.qa_baidu_text: Your current browser has triggered this site's security protection mechanism. Please refresh the site or switch browsers.
installing.qa_win7: How to install user scripts on Windows 7
installing.qa_win7_text: Please use the 'Violentmonkey' user script manager.
